saveModeDesc.stock_and_cari: Products are added and stock entries are created. If an account is selected, an account transaction is also recorded
saveModeDesc.stock_only: Products are added to the system, no stock entries or account transactions are created
saveModeDesc.cari_borc_only: No products or stock entries are created, only a buy/sell transaction is recorded to the account
saveModeDesc.direct_gider: A direct expense record is created from the selected cash account, no products/stock
saveModeDesc.cari_odeme_tahsilat: A payment to or collection from the account is recorded
saveModeDesc.irsaliye_pending: Products are entered into stock, no account debt. Linked when invoice arrives

capture.title: Invoice Photo
capture.tip1: Place the invoice on a flat surface
capture.tip2: Frame all text within the photo

review.title: Review Results
review.totalRequired: Cannot save without entering an amount
review.onlyProductsDesc: Products are added to the system, no stock entries or account transactions are created
review.productsAndMovementsDesc: Products are added and stock in/out entries are created. If an account is selected, an account transaction is also recorded
review.onlyCariTransactionDesc: No products or stock entries are created, only a buy/sell transaction is recorded to the account
review.cariRequired: Account selection is required for this mode
review.hesapRequired: Account selection is required for this mode
review.notTypeWarning: This document was detected as a 'note'. Please check the save mode.
review.irsaliyePendingDesc: Products will be entered into stock, account debt will be created later with the invoice.
review.pendingIrsaliyeDoubleWarning: Stock will be entered twice, are you sure?
review.pendingIrsaliyeAutoMode: Stock was already entered via waybill, only account debt will be created.

newProductModal.title: New Product Confirmation
newProductModal.message: These products were not found in your records. Create them as new products?

messages.successIrsaliyePending: {{productCount}} products entered into stock, waybill saved as pending
messages.ocrFailed: Could not read text. Please try again or enter manually.
messages.noProductLines: No product lines found. Check the photo.
messages.alreadySaved: This session has already been saved.
messages.networkError: No internet connection found. Internet is required for invoice analysis.

batch.saveAllDesc: Each invoice is processed according to its own save mode. Tap an invoice to change it.
